refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability to inputs, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by reviewing documented performance targets linked to worksite inputs and audit logs of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine for performance targets
Traceable data storage schema for performance requirements
Update management process with versioning and audit trail
selected_dp.selected_dp: Algorithmic derivation engine for performance targets; Traceable data storage schema for performance requirements; Update management process with versioning and audit trail

potential_sources: Data dependencies between derivation and recording
Versioning dependencies between recording and update management
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically coupled but can be modularized with clear interfaces; no circular dependencies detected.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate worksite mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not tightly controlled
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit interface definitions between derivation, recording, and update management DPs to reduce coupling.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level module responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives worksite mission context and operational data for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance requirements to vehicle and teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data synchronization and update management with external systems

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as this module owns the full performance requirement lifecycle; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle module consumes performance requirements but does not manage derivation or recording.
Teleoperation uses performance data but is not responsible for derivation or management.
Safety Services unrelated to performance requirement derivation and management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing performance requirement derivation, recording, and management in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports traceability.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex
Interface dependencies with Vehicle and Teleoperation must be well-defined to avoid diffusion
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity of NGHE Solution module; consider sub-modularization if complexity grows.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Functional decomposition is clear and DPs logically address each sub-FR with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Possible diffusion if interfaces between NGHE Solution and Vehicle/Teleoperation are not tightly controlled.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as appropriate IM boundary.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documentation review and system integration tests of interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution IM with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Define explicit interface contracts for Telemetry, Tasking, and Network Link to reduce diffusion risk.
Plan for modularization within NGHE Solution if complexity increases.

decision.justification: Overall decomposition and assignments are sound but refinement of interface definitions and modularization planning is needed to mitigate diffusion and complexity risks.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: To explicitly define interface contracts and plan for modularization within NGHE Solution to manage complexity and diffusion.

assumptions: Worksite mission context data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can handle complexity of performance requirement lifecycle
open_risks: Data inconsistency risk if update management is weak
Interface diffusion risk with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
evidence_needed: Interface specifications and data flow diagrams
Complexity analysis of NGHE Solution module
